as for JAP vs. SWE, Japan's playing quality ball, but the Swedes won't roll over that easily, both teams are desperate to make it out of the group and will fight to the death, it's football, anything can happen, but I'm fully expecting goals in this one

$100 on the Bosnia and Herzegovina vs. Qatar match

predicting that Bosnia won't win by 3 goals, i took the +2.5 spread

just started my journey on Firefly because the pools are extremely interesting and the app itself is top-tier

their current rewards are also massive: they’re offering $200 USDC in daily drops ($5,800 total) plus a $20 daily loss protection

as for the game, Qatar is actually a very gritty team, a lot of people are looking at their blowout loss against Canada, but they completely forget how many red cards Qatar picked up in that match, Bosnia will most likely win, but it won’t be a blowout

I think Qatar is furious, and even if they crash out of the tournament, they’ll go down fighting

then again, it's football, so anything can happen, that's why we love it

join me on Firefly and let's share the pool together

Polymarket trader made almost $1M on sports and continues to grind the World Cup

the whale decided that Belgium will beat Iran today, dropping $20,000 on this outcome

sitting on a massive $923k all-time PnL

and Spain vs Saudi Arabia is coming up soon, where I think the Spaniards should confidently dominate and win

as for today's match, while Belgium looks like a very confident move for the whale, I prefer to take Iran +2.5 handicap

the Belgians definitely need this win to avoid a high-stress third match, but Iran is coming with massive sports anger fueling them

they are dealing with a logistical nightmare, basing in Tijuana and commuting 5 hours across the border to LA for games, plus customs drama like Torabi's visa burning right at the border

I'm expecting a minimal, pragmatic win for Belgium, and I'm not ruling out a gritty draw, so Iran +2.5 at 79¢ looks way more reliable for me

his polymarket account: https://t.co/DlO1GuO97r

drop a follow if you love trading sports

will Belgium win on class or does Iran's grit stop them? what's your play?

- USA to win: $47,935 at 42¢ (payout $115k)
- no draw: $18,045 at 78¢ (payout $23k)

the US enter as heavy favorites, but Australia shocked everyone against Turkey and can definitely show up today

personally, taking Australia "no" at 83¢ looks very attractive, it covers both a dominant US win and a gritty low-scoring draw, a much smoother risk-to-reward
